title: Ectadium rotundifolium
taxonomy: Ectadium rotundifolium is a species in the family Apocynaceae. It is a plant native to Madagascar. The classification of Ectadium rotundifolium is further divided into the genus Ectadium, which belongs to the order Gentianales. The order Gentianales is a part of the clade Asterids. Ectadium rotundifolium is classified into the kingdom Plantae.

Further research is needed to fully understand the health benefits of Ectadium rotundifolium.
